title: Housolution Grabber Tool Magnetic Four-Claw Picker, Bendable Hose Reacher Pickup Sweeper with LED Lights, Flexible Long Handy Reaching Assist Tool for Litter Pick/Home Sink/Drain - Blue
features: STRONG MAGNETIC POWER: The strong magnetic power makes the maximum grip weight is up to 3Ib. The flexible metal tube has good toughness that can be bent freely. The diameter of hose is 2.5cm/0.99". It is perfect for picking up small items in narrow spaces.

NOT EASILY FALL OFF: The maximum diameter of the four-jaw opening is about 2.8cm/1.10". It is easy to grab a variety of small objects, and make you grasp firmly to prevent it from accidental falling when pick up something.

EASY TO USE: One-piece alloy steel structure, and end-end elastic push-type handle, which is effortless to grip and comfortable to operate. The front end of the handle can easily grasp the object with the retractable four-claws.

LED LIGHTS(Batteries are Included): Comes with LED lights at the handle which are controlled by a black switch button, it increases brightness in dark light. And the LED lighting is powered by 3 x LR44 batteries (Included).
WIDE APPLICATION: This grabber tool is widely used in sewers, toilets, garbage, or auto repair shop suction screw fittings and tools, etc.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Easy to Operate in 4 Steps 1 Step 1: Reach 2 Step 2: Press 3 Step 3: Illuminate 4 Step 4: Remove Previous page Next page Strong Magnetism Built-in strong magnet helps stably grab magnetic or metallic items. Maximum grip weight is up to 3 LBS. Flexible Shaft Offers great toughness and not easy to break. You can feel free to bend it for convenient operation and keep its shape after repeated use. Four-Claw Grab the item more firmly and not easy to fall. Adotped the quality metal material, solid and durable. Battery-Powered Powered by 3 x LR44 batteries (package included). Please install the batteries first to ensure the normal use of LED light. What can it be used to grab? Can it catch something thin and small like a tissue or coin? The max diameter of the opening is about 1.1'' and has strong magnet. It can grab small items like keys, small parts, etc. Yes, there is no problem to catch light tissue and thin coin, but if a coin lies flat on the floor, it may take a little work. Is it the grabber tool stretchable? How long is it? The grabber tool is NOT stretchable but with the flexible shaft, it can freely bend and reach to somewhere you need. The length is about 24 1/2", which meets most of daily needs. What type of battery does the LED light need to be powered by? It is powered by 3 x LR44 batteries (Package included).
